summary: Software engineer with around 6 years of experience building and shipping web applications across the stack. Comfortable jumping between frontend and backend work, enjoy clean code, and care about shipping features users actually use. Looking for my next role on a product-focused engineering team where I can keep growing.

bullets.text: Worked on various features across the company's customer-facing web platform
Built and maintained React components for the user dashboard and account settings pages
Helped improve API response times for several slow endpoints
Integrated a third-party payments provider (Stripe) into the checkout flow
Wrote and maintained backend endpoints in Python (Flask) backing the dashboard
Participated in code reviews, sprint planning, and other agile ceremonies
Fixed bugs reported by customers and triaged incoming support tickets
Developed internal tools and services using Python
Wrote scripts to automate nightly data-processing and reporting jobs
Maintained and tuned a production MySQL database backing the analytics product
Built a small REST API to expose reporting data to other internal teams
Assisted senior engineers with backend tasks and on-call investigations
Added logging and basic dashboards to help debug a recurring data pipeline issue
Built responsive marketing websites for small-business clients using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript
Customized WordPress themes and plugins to client specifications
Optimized page load times and improved Lighthouse scores for client sites
Coordinated with designers to translate Figma mockups into pixel-perfect pages
Set up basic Google Analytics tracking and SEO metadata for launched sites

projects.name: devlog
projects.text: Self-hosted markdown blogging tool (Python/Flask + SQLite); ~300 GitHub stars, used by a handful of other developers

projects.name: commute-timer
projects.text: Small React + TypeScript app that estimates transit times; built to learn the Maps API

projects.name: open-source
projects.text: Occasional open-source contributor — small bug-fix PRs to a few Python libraries
